{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Subspace Engine
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]]'s internal [[Subspace Engine]] was upgraded during his evolution.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
